function.name: CranialImplantPlanning
function.description: Guided interactive workflow for CranialImplantPlanning. Execute steps in order. Interactive steps require user 3D interaction. Steps: 'cb_step_1': In the "Segment Editor" module, under the "Source Volume" selection section, choose the volume for segmentation.; 'cb_step_2': In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Cranial_Segmentation".; 'cb_step_3': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Cranial_Segment".; 'cb_step_4': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.; 'cb_step_5': In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold range bar to set the range value for segmentation.; 'cb_step_6': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.; 'cb_step_7': In the "Skull Mask" section, choose the segment node.; 'cb_step_8': Click the "Load Skull Mask" button.; 'cb_step_9': Click the "Add ROI" button.; 'cb_step_10': Manually adjust the boundaries of the ROI to retain the skull portion. (interactive: roi)

user_action.description: Action: 'start' to begin a step, 'proceed' after user completes interaction, 'skip' for optional steps, 'cancel' to abort workflow, 'choice_made' for user_choice steps

choice_value.description: Value selected by the user for user_choice steps. Required when user_action is 'choice_made'.
